XMLDB.COMMENT: XMLDB file for local plugin virtuallab

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Batch name (e.g. Projeto de Interface 2026/1)

FIELD.NAME: categoryid
FIELD.COMMENT: Moodle course_categories.id — the batch own subcategory

FIELD.NAME: nameprefix
FIELD.COMMENT: Lab name prefix (e.g. Lab EAD → Lab EAD 01)

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp of batch creation

FIELD.NAME: maxteachers
FIELD.COMMENT: Per-batch override for max editors per lab; NULL uses the global default

FIELD.NAME: lifecyclemonths
FIELD.COMMENT: Per-batch override for lifecycle months; NULL uses the global default

FIELD.NAME: lifecycleaction
FIELD.COMMENT: Per-batch override for lifecycle action; NULL uses the global default

FIELD.NAME: warningdays
FIELD.COMMENT: Per-batch override for warning days; NULL uses the global default

FIELD.NAME: lifecyclestart
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp the lifecycle clock counts from for this batch; NULL uses the global epoch

FIELD.NAME: batchid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK local_virtuallab_batches.id

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK user.id — responsible teacher

TABLE.NAME: local_virtuallab_batch_tasks
TABLE.COMMENT: Shared checklist tasks pushed into each lab of a batch

FIELD.NAME: batchid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK local_virtuallab_batches.id

FIELD.NAME: title
FIELD.COMMENT: Task title shown in the teacher checklist block

FIELD.NAME: sortorder
FIELD.COMMENT: Display order

FIELD.NAME: batchid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK local_virtuallab_batches.id

FIELD.NAME: courseid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK course.id — managed sandbox course

FIELD.NAME: enrolid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK enrol.id — manual enrolment instance used by the panel

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp of lab creation — base for lifecycle

FIELD.NAME: lastreset
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp of last successful reset (0 = never)

FIELD.NAME: lastwarn
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp of last lifecycle warning email sent to the teacher (0 = never)

FIELD.NAME: originalfullname
FIELD.COMMENT: Course fullname at creation, restored on reset

FIELD.NAME: originalshortname
FIELD.COMMENT: Course shortname at creation, restored on reset
